metadata.name: Model Monitoring Requirements
metadata.description: Ensures production models are continuously monitored for performance degradation

rules.name: Monitoring enabled
rules.description: Production models must have monitoring enabled
rules.remediation: Enable monitoring for the production model

rules.name: Performance thresholds defined
rules.description: Models must have defined performance thresholds for alerts
rules.remediation: Define performance thresholds for model monitoring alerts

rules.name: Recent monitoring report available
rules.description: Models must have monitoring reports generated within the last 30 days
rules.remediation: Generate monthly monitoring report for the model

rules.name: Data drift monitoring active
rules.description: Models must monitor for input data drift
rules.remediation: Enable data drift monitoring for the model
